title: About LIXMA
desc: LIXMA focuses on solar systems, energy applications, and smart monitoring, delivering complete green-energy solutions from planning and design to construction and maintenance.
introQuote: We turn renewable energy into stable everyday infrastructure through professional engineering.
introText: Since its founding, LIXMA has continued to develop solar and energy management expertise, covering site assessment, system construction, monitoring, maintenance, and long-term management.

values.title: Efficient Energy Use
values.text: Helping customers improve energy efficiency and reduce long-term operating costs.

values.title: Renewable Energy Development
values.text: Introducing solar and smart-energy technologies to support sustainability.

values.title: Smart Monitoring
values.text: Tracking system performance through monitoring and maintenance to keep operations stable.
